metadata.title: China Solar PV Supplier Shortlist — Back Contact (IBC/ABC/HBC/HPBC) focus + premium N-type
metadata.description: Chinese manufacturers prioritising Back Contact cell technology (Aiko ABC, LONGi HIBC/HPBC, Maxeon IBC, Huansheng HBC, SPIC HBC, DAS XBC, Akcome HJT-IBC, GS-Solar HBC) with bifacial / mixed N-type options (Trina Vertex N, Jinko Tiger Neo, JA DeepBlue 4.0, Canadian TOPHiKu7, Risen Hyper-ion HJT, Tongwei THC HJT, Jolywood n-TOPCon) as comparable alternatives. Target use-case: ~50 m² / ~10 kW rooftop pilot for GO Corporation (Thailand) with scale-up to container / utility volumes.

search_criteria.target_product: Back Contact (IBC / ABC / HBC / HPBC) solar PV module; bifacial and other N-type (TOPCon / HJT) welcome as alternative bids
priority_features: Back Contact cell architecture (IBC / ABC / HBC / HPBC / XBC)
All-black aesthetic (black frame + black backsheet) options

email_verification_notes.action_required: ALL emails below are best-effort from public vendor websites or domain inference — verify each against the vendor's current contact page before dispatch, and monitor bounces on first send. Prefer adding a verified personal sales contact from LinkedIn / Alibaba / Made-in-China listings where possible.

companies.name_en: Zhuhai Aiko Solar Energy Co., Ltd.
companies.name_cn: 珠海爱旭新能源股份有限公司
companies.email_notes: Domain @aikosolar.com; overseas@ is a standard alias on their global contact page. Verify before send.
companies.product_summary: Industry leader in ABC (All Back Contact) n-type cells and modules. Flagship 'Aiko Infinite' series — all-black, ABC cell, ~24% module efficiency. Strong residential + C&I rooftop track record in Europe.
companies.notes: THE front-runner for ABC Back Contact. Bloomberg-BNEF Tier 1. Listed SSE 600732. Prioritise for pilot.

companies.name_en: LONGi Green Energy Technology Co., Ltd.
companies.name_cn: 隆基绿能科技股份有限公司
companies.email_notes: module@longi.com is the listed module-sales alias on longi.com/contact. Verify before send.
companies.product_summary: Hi-MO 9 HIBC (Hybrid Interdigitated Back Contact, launched 2025) at ~24.8% module efficiency; Hi-MO X10 HPBC2 bifacial; Hi-MO 7 for mainstream TOPCon. The world's largest PV module maker by volume.
companies.notes: Bloomberg-BNEF Tier 1. Listed SSE 601012. Strongest brand in IBC space after Aiko. Sample pricing typically on web-quote.

companies.email_notes: contact@maxeon.com is the global inquiry alias on maxeon.com; info.cn is an inferred China-regional alias. Verify via their Asia sales team page.
companies.product_summary: Maxeon 7 (~24.1% efficiency IBC, all-black), Maxeon 6 AC, Performance 7 (shingled). Originally spun out of SunPower. Manufacturing in Malaysia and China (Jiaxing).
companies.notes: Premium residential brand. 40-year product warranty. Expect premium pricing — include as quality benchmark.

companies.name_cn: 江苏环晟光伏有限公司
companies.email_notes: Domain inferred from Made-in-China listing; confirm via vendor contact page before dispatch.
companies.product_summary: HBC (Heterojunction Back Contact) modules; SMBB shingled technology. Subsidiary of Sungrow / Jinergy lineage.
companies.notes: Second-tier but specialist in Back Contact — useful for cost-competitive HBC bid.

companies.name_en: Xi'an SPIC Solar Energy Technology Co., Ltd.
companies.name_cn: 西安隆基乐叶光伏科技有限公司 / 国家电投西安太阳能
companies.email_notes: Xi'an SPIC Solar operates under State Power Investment Corp. Verify current commercial contact via xsunergy.com.
companies.product_summary: State Power Investment Corporation-backed. IBC / HBC modules for utility and rooftop. Heavy domestic China market focus; selective exports.
companies.notes: SOE-backed. Useful as bankable reference quote; may be slower to respond.

companies.name_cn: 一道新能源科技股份有限公司
companies.email_notes: Domain inferred from das-solar.com contact page; verify overseas alias.
companies.product_summary: n-type TOPCon leader; DAS-i XBC (back contact) series launched 2024. Module efficiency up to 23.4%. Strong Southeast Asia channel presence.
companies.notes: Rising mid-tier with serious XBC product — good price/performance candidate.

companies.name_cn: 苏州爱康科技股份有限公司
companies.email_notes: overseas@akcome.com listed on akcome.com/en/contact; verify before dispatch.
companies.product_summary: HJT and HJT-IBC hybrid modules. 'Chasing Light' HJT series ~22.9%. Listed SZSE 002610.
companies.notes: Has been through financial restructuring — confirm current delivery reliability.

companies.name_cn: 金石能源 / 福建金石能源有限公司
companies.product_summary: HBC + HJT modules. Early HJT pioneer in China.
companies.notes: Niche Back Contact / HJT specialist. Useful for diversification.

companies.name_cn: 天合光能股份有限公司
companies.email_notes: info@trinasolar.com is the global inquiry alias; APAC alias inferred — verify via trinasolar.com/en-apac/contact.
companies.product_summary: Vertex N n-type TOPCon bifacial (NEG21C.20, NEG19RC.20). Bloomberg-BNEF Tier 1. Listed SSE 688599. Strong Thailand & SEA sales channel.
companies.notes: Tier-1 TOPCon alt — not Back Contact but top bifacial bankable. Include per 'mixed optional' instruction.

companies.name_cn: 晶科能源股份有限公司
companies.product_summary: Tiger Neo N-type TOPCon (JKM630N-78HL4M-BDV). World No.1 module shipments in several years. Strong Thailand presence.
companies.notes: Bloomberg-BNEF Tier 1. Listed NYSE JKS + SSE 688223.

companies.name_cn: 晶澳太阳能科技股份有限公司
companies.email_notes: Standard sales alias; verify against jasolar.com/html/en/contactUs.
companies.product_summary: DeepBlue 4.0 Pro (n-type TOPCon bifacial). Tier-1 bankable. Listed SZSE 002459.
TOPHiKu7 n-type TOPCon (CS7N series), HiHero HJT. Listed NASDAQ CSIQ + SSE 688472.
companies.notes: Bloomberg-BNEF Tier 1. Strong North America + SEA channel.

companies.name_cn: 东方日升新能源股份有限公司
companies.product_summary: Hyper-ion HJT modules (~22.5% efficiency, bifacial). Listed SZSE 300118.
companies.notes: HJT pioneer in China; 30-yr product warranty on Hyper-ion.

companies.name_cn: 通威太阳能（合肥）有限公司
companies.email_notes: solar@tongwei.com listed on tongwei.com group contact; subsidiary overseas alias inferred — verify.
companies.product_summary: THC series HJT modules + TOPCon. World's largest polysilicon + solar cell manufacturer by capacity. Listed SSE 600438.
companies.notes: Parent Tongwei Group — scale leader; aggressive pricing possible.

companies.name_cn: 苏州中来光伏新材股份有限公司
companies.product_summary: n-TOPCon specialist (one of the earliest n-TOPCon producers in China). Niwa Black series (all-black bifacial TOPCon). Listed SZSE 300393.
companies.notes: n-TOPCon pioneer; strong all-black residential offering (Niwa Black).
